name: lock contracts: lock-acquire on a section currently held by a live PID blocks (or fails fast with --no-wait)
command: ( bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section rubric --holder $$ --expires-in 60 && sleep 5 ) & pid=$!; sleep 0.2; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section rubric --holder $$ --no-wait; code=$?; kill $pid 2>/dev/null; wait $pid 2>/dev/null; [ "$code" = "1" ] && echo ok 1>&2
